title: Add format descriptors infor to podman top
body:
Trying to play with podman top, I had a hard time
finding info on format options.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
LGTM

(something cosmetic: maybe psgo should return a sorted slice)
